backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the WRAITH intelligence platform, defining data types (Mission, ThreatAssessment, AssetProfile, ClassifiedNote, MissionBriefing) and state maps, with mixins for blob storage and authorization, plus admin management functions.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the WRAITH React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component setting up TanStack Router with authentication guards, a profile setup modal, and routes for MissionDashboard, IntelligenceHub, FieldOpsBriefing, and AdminPanel pages.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanelConten: Admin panel UI component that displays the current admin principal list with revoke buttons and an alert dialog confirmation, plus a form to grant admin access by principal ID string.
frontend/src/components/AssetProfileForm: Form component for creating and editing asset profiles, with fields for codename, clearance level, status, bio, and a checkbox list of specialized skills wired to backend create/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/AssetProfilesSec: Displays a list of asset profiles with options to create, edit, and delete entries, using dialogs and alert dialogs for form and confirmation UI.
frontend/src/components/BriefingForm.tsx: Form component for creating or updating a mission briefing, including fields for objectives, HVT profiles, classification level, and other mission details.
frontend/src/components/BriefingView.tsx: Read-only full-screen view of a mission briefing document with print support, displaying objectives, HVT profiles, classification banner, and mission metadata.
frontend/src/components/ClassificationBa: Simple banner component that displays a classification level label with appropriate styling.
frontend/src/components/ClassifiedNoteFo: Form component for creating or editing a classified note, with fields for title, body, classification level, and author.
frontend/src/components/EncryptedNotesSe: Displays a list of classified notes with expand/collapse for body content, and supports creating, editing, and deleting notes via dialogs.
Displays a scrollable log of field reports for a mission and provides a form to submit new reports using the `useAddFieldReport` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that renders a full-screen background image with a dark overlay, a top navigation bar, a main content outlet, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/MissionDetail.ts: Shows detailed information for a single mission including metadata, objectives, assigned operatives, and a field reports log, with an inline edit mode via MissionForm.
frontend/src/components/MissionForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing a mission, managing fields like codename, status, threat level, mission type, operatives, and objectives via create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/MissionList.tsx: Renders a filterable, paginated list of missions with status and threat level filters, view navigation, and delete confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar with WRAITH branding, route links, Internet Identity login/logout handling, and a responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time operative registration that collects name, callsign, and department, then saves the profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/components/RedactionBar.tsx: A simple presentational component that renders a black inline bar to visually redact text content.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a styled badge displaying a mission's status (active, compromised, completed, aborted) with color-coded styling per status.
frontend/src/components/ThreatAssessment: A form component for creating or editing a threat assessment, including fields for subject name, threat category, risk score slider, summary, and linked missions.
Displays a list of all threat assessments with risk-color-coded cards and supports creating, editing, and deleting assessments via dialogs and mutations.
Renders an icon and label for a given threat level (low, elevated, critical) with appropriate color and glow styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor calls, covering user profiles, admin management, missions, and related entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing custom fonts and defining the WRAITH dark theme via CSS variables (OKLCH colors), Tailwind layers, and utility classes for glows, classification banners, and ops-themed components.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging, timestamp formatting, and converting backend enum values (clearance levels, mission statuses, threat levels, etc.) to display labels and CSS class names.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that checks authentication and admin status, rendering access-denied screens for unauthorized users or the AdminPanelContent component for verified admins.
frontend/src/pages/FieldOpsBriefing.tsx: Page for managing classified mission briefing documents, supporting listing, creating, editing, viewing, and deleting briefings with stats and dialog-based forms.
frontend/src/pages/IntelligenceHub.tsx: Tabbed intelligence hub page organizing asset profiles, threat assessments, and encrypted notes into three separate section components.
frontend/src/pages/MissionDashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page for the Mission Ops module that displays mission stats, a filterable mission list, and handles navigation to mission detail and creation form via dialogs and state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the project's dark ops-themed design system, including custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), OKLCH-based color tokens, and plugin imports for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking version, feature list, architectural notes, and known issues for a WRAITH-themed classified intelligence app with Mission Dashboard, Intelligence Hub, and Field Ops Briefing Tool modules.
